summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Astuceson Forum MVP - all core features working correctly
passed_tests: API Health Check - Returns correct status and message
Verification Badges API - Returns all 6 badge types (verified, official, governmental, partner, creator, press)
Categories API - Returns all 6 default categories (Général, TikTok, Twitch, YouTube, Setup & Matos, Events & IRL)
Public Stats API - Returns users_count, topics_count, posts_count
Topics API - Returns proper structure with topics array and total count
Search API - Responds correctly
Auth endpoints properly protected (401 without token)
CORS headers configured correctly
Homepage loads with stats display (2 Membres, 1 Discussions, 1 Messages)
Homepage displays all 6 categories with descriptions
Discord CTA present and functional
TikTok CTA present and functional
Cookie consent banner appears and functions
Navigation elements work (Home, Forum, Search)
Login button redirects to Google OAuth
Forum page loads with categories sidebar
Search functionality works
Footer legal links work (CGU, Privacy, Cookies)
Admin panel properly protected (requires auth)
Notifications page properly protected (requires auth)
My Reports page properly protected (requires auth)
My Reports link accessible from notifications page

success_percentage.frontend: 95% - All major features working, minor note: notifications/reports pages correctly require auth
